transcript.text:
[This is city of Incheon]
[And it's...]
[Incheon Chinatown]
[This isn't enough]
[Ganghwa Island]
[Have you heard of Artemisia Indica Mung Bean Pancakes?]
[Can't forget about the rice wine]
[Incheon Takeover]
[Come visit Incheon!]
[Where are we today?]
[Incheon Chinatown]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Incheon Chinatown today
I noticed there were so many Chinese cuisines here
I'm starving right now
Incheon Tourism Organization is using their specialties for the

2021 Incheon Gourmet Tourism Eatery Contest
These include their Makgeolli (rice wine), skates (fish), ginseng chicken broth, market street foods,
And last but not least the Jjolmeyon (chewy noodles) and jjajangmyeon (black bean noodles)
From those, I will be eating jjajangmyeon and Makgeolli (rice wine)
I'm so hungry
Where's my jjajangmyeon?
This is it
[Tae Hwa Won located in Incheon, Jung-gu]
Hello
Thank you
There are so many items on the menu
How many are there? All the way here
1 sweet & sour pork,
1 menbosha (fried shrimp toast), 1 kkanshyo shrimp (fried shrimp with spicy sauce)
1 samseon jjamppong (spicy seafood noodles), 1 yuni jjajangmyeon (ground meat black bean noodles)
Also 1 seafood fried rice

[Well...]
That's a lot of food, Are you sure?
[Of course]
I've been to Incheon many times before I've had their bulgogi, some Chinese dishes, etc
They have a lot of tasty foods
A lot of old restaurants with years of tradition
A lot of hole-in-the-wall restaurants
[I'll show you the taste of Incheon!]
[Seafood fried rice]
[Menbosha]
[Fried Sweet & Sour Pork]
[Kkanshyo shrimp]
[Samseong Jjamppong]
That's too much
She won't finish it
[A table full of food]

[Stacks]
[There's more]
[She's going to eat all of that?]
Let's pour the jjajang sauce first
[That just looks delicious]
Bon appetit
Jjajangmyeon first
The sauce is very strong
It's my first time trying Yuni-Jjajangmyeon
There aren't chunks of vegetables
Ground vegetables and meat It's really good
Wow, that's good
I can taste the meat The ground meat is just...
It goes well with the noodles
Fried pork this time It comes out like Guo Bao Rou
Do you know what that is?

They gave me scissors to cut it, but I'm going to eat it as a whole
Dip it
Delicious
Menbosha!
That's so many
How many is that? Amazing
It's so soft inside
What is this? It's so much better than I expected
I wasn't expecting much
Tasty!
The outside is very thin
Once that outer layer breaks, It's filled with soft shrimp meats
Kkanshyo shrimp this time!
Let's try this now Huge portions too
I've never seen this many menboshas and kkanshyo shrimp per dish
Moist

You have to dine-in for these Chinese cuisines
It tastes different
Spicy seafood noodles before the noodles get bloated
Its got so many ingredients
Mussel, shrimp
Scallops(?)
Abalone too
Amazing
Webfoot octopus
Mushroom
Mussel
Let's try the soup first
Smoky flavor
This is spicy
Those who can't eat spicy foods won't like this
It's spicy

It's tasty
Let's cut the fried pork
It's supposed to be cut
It doesn't matter how you eat it
I haven't had fried rice yet
That's a lot of seafood
Amazing, right?
With some jjajang sauce
They go so well together!
That's so much seafood
There are about 30 Chinese cuisines here in Chinatown
I want to try all of them
To decide the best
Jjajangmyeon It's not bloated yet!
Should I just finish 1 item at a time?
That's big

This abalone is huge, right?
So big
[Fried rice next!]
I'm not too sure but it just looks cooked perfectly
Can't say this is 1, But there's 1 left
There's a traditional market here in Incheon too
I'm a traditional market representative
I heard that Shinpo Market's sweet & sour chicken is famous
A lot of other tasty foods there too
I'll be going there next time
I sometimes find myself holding the spoon like this
I've seen a lot of people that prefer Jjamppong over Jjajangmyeon
I like Jjajangmyeon more
[Finishing up the bowl of Jjamppong]
No more noodles in here
[Well, you ate it all]

[Won't leave a single grain of rice]
[Cleared the fried rice]
Oh right, I didn't know about this, but
Jjolmeyon (chewy noodles) was first made here in Incheon
It was accidentally invented
So there are really old restaurants that specialize in original Jjolmyeon
Another good reason for me to come back to Incheon
Some sweet & sour pork with menbosha
[Is this possible?]
[Absolutely]
[Complete]
Are you done?!
I'm finished
I will end the Chinese food here
I will be going to Ganghwa Island for some Korean pancakes and rice wine
Let's go~!

[Ganghwa Island]
[Where did she go?]
I'm here at Ganghwado
On my way to eat Korean pancakes and rice wine
But before that,
There's a 100-year-old brewery here so I had to check it out
[Keum Poong Brewery located in Incheon, Ganghwa-gun]
This brewery is 100 years old
Anyone can come in to visit and get an experience
Hi puppy
You're cute
[A very cool interior]
[Great place for photos]
The inside is much prettier than expected
It's decorated very nicely
Anyone can come inside to look around and do a taste test

I've already digested all the food I just had
Let's go eat some more
[Jan Jan Han Shik Tak located in Incheon Ganghwa-gun]
[Artemisia Indica Mung Bean Pancakes]
Ta-da
This pancake and rice wine got nominated as #1 in Incheon Gourmet Tourism Eatery Contest
This rice wine has 100 years of tradition
And this is the Artemisia Indica Mung Bean Pancakes
That's a very strange name
The plant is grown here at Ganghwa Island
And also this rice wine is made with rice made in Ganghwa Island
Rice wine first
The consistency looks very thick Almost like a morning beverage Morning Sunlight
Korean pancakes and rice wine is the way to go
Let's take a bite first
It's really thick

Looks like some stuff are blended into this mungbean pancake
That's delicious
Very different from what I expected
I thought I would taste a lot of flour because of its thickness
But it's not like that at all
The texture is very crispy and nice
The plant is not too strong either It lingers around a bit in the aftertaste
It's great
[Well how about the Makgeolli?]
Definitely different from regular Makgeolli
Better quality and cleaner
A very strong rice flavor
A lot less carbonation, so it's much more smooth
How did you come up with this?
We tried to come up with a food item made with Incheon's ingredients
We found out that Artemisia Indica is really good for women

I'll try the shrimp as a whole too
So good
How can Mung Bean Pancake taste this good?
Excuse me, Can I get some more to-go?
Do you have more?
I can make 30 more for you if you want
[I asked for 6 more] I'm going to eat them at home
[Finished]
Everything was really good today
There are so many good eateries in Incheon
The city is surrounded by the ocean, so there are lots of seafood
A lot of things to see too
So it'd be great if you can come visit Incheon in your spare time
Thanks everyone
Come visit Incheon~!! [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
